description_long: This airplane features a futuristic, angular design with a predominantly dark metallic exterior accented by blue and red highlights. The wings are sharply swept back and integrated into the main body, giving it a stealthy, aggressive appearance. The fuselage is compact and robust, with visible paneling and layered armor-like surfaces. The tail section extends into a pointed, bifurcated structure, while the underside shows hints of mechanical components and possible weapon mounts. The cockpit is centrally located and appears to be heavily armored, with a low-profile canopy. The overall aesthetic suggests a high-performance, possibly military or sci-fi inspired aircraft.
description: A sleek, dark, angular airplane with swept-back wings, blue and red accents, and a compact, armored fuselage.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, angular wings and the central, armored cockpit flanked by aggressive wing extensions.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated, pointed tail and the layered, mechanical details along the fuselage and wings.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the bifurcated tail structure and the full span of the swept-back wings with blue highlights.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, emphasizing the sharp, angular lines and the integration of the wings with the main body.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept, angular wings and pronounced anhedral angle; no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines integrated within the main fuselage, with intakes visible on either side.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers with a split, V-shaped tail structure.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable landing gear, main and nose units not visibly extended.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a low-profile, single-seat canopy integrated into the fuselage.
